About.title: About
About.hello: Hello! I'm a software developer based in San Francisco, passionate about building great web experiences and writing clean, maintainable code.
About.backgroundText: With over 10 years of experience in software development, I specialize in full-stack web development with a focus on React, TypeScript, and Node.js. I've worked at various startups and established companies, shipping products used by millions of people.

topics.webDev: Web development best practices and patterns

About.getInTouchText: Feel free to reach out to me on {twitter} or {github}. I'm always happy to connect with fellow developers!
